members.name: John Thomas 'Jack' Osbourne
members.notes: Worked night shifts as a toolmaker at the General Electric Company (GEC) in Birmingham.

members.name: Lillian 'Lilian' Osbourne (nee Unitt)
members.notes: Non-observant Catholic who worked at a Lucas factory in Aston, Birmingham.

members.name: Don Arden (born Harry Levy)
members.notes: Rock and roll entrepreneur and music manager nicknamed the 'Al Capone of Pop'.

members.name: Hope Arden (nee Shaw)
members.notes: Former ballet dancer and teacher; married Don Arden in the 1940s.

members.name: John Michael 'Ozzy' Osbourne
members.relationship: Root person - the Prince of Darkness
members.notes: Black Sabbath frontman and heavy metal pioneer; died July 22, 2025 at age 76.

members.name: Jean Osbourne
members.notes: Attended Black Sabbath's final show in July 2025 weeks before Ozzy's death.

members.name: Iris Osbourne
members.notes: Sister closest in age to Ozzy; died in a car accident when he was a teenager.

members.name: Gillian Hemming (nee Osbourne)
members.notes: Remained close to Ozzy over the decades and attended his farewell show.

members.name: Paul Osbourne
members.notes: One of Ozzy's two younger brothers who grew up in the 14 Lodge Road household.

members.name: Tony Osbourne
members.notes: Ozzy's youngest brother; stayed largely out of the public spotlight.

members.name: Thelma Mayfair Riley
members.notes: Met Ozzy in 1971 in Birmingham; marriage ended amid his touring and substance use.

members.name: Sharon Rachel Osbourne (nee Arden)
members.notes: TV personality, talent manager, and co-star of MTV's The Osbournes; managed Ozzy's solo career.

members.name: David Arden (born David Levy)
members.notes: Former music manager and record producer who worked in his father Don Arden's music business.

members.name: Elliot Kingsley
members.relationship: Adopted son of Ozzy (Thelma's son from prior relationship)
members.notes: Ozzy adopted Elliot when he was five; lives entirely out of the public spotlight.

members.name: Jessica Starshine Osbourne
members.notes: Actress and wardrobe/costuming professional with credits including Better Call Saul.

members.name: Louis John Osbourne
members.notes: Works as a DJ; married to Louise Lennon; signed the family's 2025 death announcement.

members.name: Aimee Rachel Osbourne
members.notes: Indie-rock singer (performs as ARO) and actress; declined to appear on MTV's The Osbournes.

members.name: Kelly Michelle Lee Osbourne
members.notes: Singer, TV personality, and fashion designer who rose to fame on The Osbournes.

members.name: Jack Joseph Osbourne
members.notes: TV personality and producer; diagnosed with multiple sclerosis in 2012.

members.name: Sidney George 'Sid' Wilson
members.notes: Slipknot turntablist and keyboardist (#0); proposed to Kelly at Ozzy's final Black Sabbath show.

members.name: Lisa Stelly
members.relationship: Ex-wife of Jack (mother of three of Ozzy's granddaughters)
members.notes: Entrepreneur and author; married Jack 2012-2019.

members.name: Aree Gearhart
members.notes: Model and Jack's second wife; mother of Jack's fourth daughter Maple.

members.name: Louise Osbourne (nee Lennon)
members.notes: Actress married to Louis; mother of Elijah and the couple's other children.

members.name: Elijah Osbourne
members.notes: Ozzy's first grandchild, born September 15, 2008 to Louis and Louise Osbourne.

members.name: Pearl Clementine Osbourne
members.relationship: Granddaughter of Ozzy (daughter of Jack and Lisa)
members.notes: Jack's eldest daughter, born April 24, 2012; known for a love of nature and Halloween.

members.name: Andy Rose Osbourne
members.relationship: Granddaughter of Ozzy (daughter of Jack and Lisa)
members.notes: Jack's second daughter, born June 13, 2015; Jack has called her 'a very unique individual'.

members.name: Minnie Theodora Osbourne
members.relationship: Granddaughter of Ozzy (daughter of Jack and Lisa)
members.notes: Born February 3, 2018; middle name Theodora honors Jack and Lisa's late son Theo.

members.name: Sidney Wilson-Osbourne
members.relationship: Grandson of Ozzy (son of Kelly and Sid)
members.notes: Kelly's only child, born November 2022; Sharon announced his birth on The Talk.

members.name: Maple Artemis Osbourne
members.relationship: Granddaughter of Ozzy (daughter of Jack and Aree)
members.notes: Jack's fourth daughter, born July 2022; his first child with second wife Aree Gearhart.
